description: An OnPush component's input object is mutated in place, so change detection never sees a new reference and the view goes stale.
body: Failure mode: a parent mutates a field of the object it passes to an OnPush child (same reference) and expects the child to update, but OnPush only re-checks when the input reference changes, so the view stays stale. Detection signals: the data changed but the OnPush child shows old values; the update used obj.field = x or arr.push instead of replacing the reference; markForCheck was added to paper over it. Do not mutate OnPush inputs in place. Safer fallback: replace objects/arrays immutably so a new reference flows in, or bind the data via an async-piped observable, and test that the view updates on replacement but not on mutation.
